help.title: Help Center
help.faq_purchase_q1: How to post a purchase demand?
help.faq_purchase_a1: Click 'Post Demand' on the homepage, fill in product info and requirements, then submit.
help.faq_purchase_a2: The AI system analyzes your purchase needs and matches the most suitable suppliers from multiple dimensions.
help.faq_purchase_a3: After posting a demand, suppliers will proactively quote. You can also send inquiries directly to suppliers.
help.faq_reverse bidding_a1: A reverse bidding is where buyers post demands and suppliers compete by bidding lower prices.
help.faq_reverse bidding_q2: How to participate in an reverse bidding?
help.faq_reverse bidding_a2: Select an reverse bidding from the list, pay the deposit, and start bidding.
help.faq_reverse bidding_q3: How is the reverse bidding deposit refunded?
help.faq_reverse bidding_a3: The deposit is automatically refunded to your account balance after the reverse bidding ends.
help.faq_order_a1: You can check order status and logistics info in Order Management.
help.faq_order_a2: Orders can be cancelled before confirmation. After confirmation, please contact customer service.
help.faq_order_q3: How to apply for after-sales service?
help.faq_order_a3: Click 'Apply for After-Sales' in the order details, fill in the reason and submit.
help.faq_payment_a1: We support bank transfer, Alipay, WeChat Pay and other payment methods.
help.faq_payment_q2: How to apply for a refund?
help.faq_payment_a2: Apply for a refund in order details. After approval, it will be refunded to the original payment method.
help.faq_payment_a3: After order completion, you can apply for an electronic invoice in order details.
help.faq_account_a1: Go to 'Profile' page and click 'Personal Info' to modify your account information.
help.faq_account_a2: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, verify via phone or email to reset.

legal.about_p1: YiCai Trade is a global supply chain smart matching platform, connecting quality suppliers and buyers worldwide through AI technology.
legal.about_mission_content: Through AI and big data technology, eliminate information asymmetry, reduce trade costs, and make global trade more efficient.
legal.about_feature_1: AI Smart Matching - Multi-dimensional analysis for precise supplier matching
legal.about_feature_2: E-Reverse Bidding - Transparent bidding for best procurement prices
legal.about_feature_3: Production Monitoring - Full-process visibility for quality assurance
legal.about_feature_4: Contract Management - E-signatures, secure and convenient
legal.about_feature_5: Data Dashboard - Real-time analytics for decision support
legal.privacy_intro: YiCai Trade Platform attaches great importance to your personal privacy and information security.
legal.privacy_collect_intro: We may collect the following types of information:
legal.privacy_collect_1: Registration info: username, email, phone number, company name, etc.
legal.privacy_collect_2: Transaction info: purchase records, quotation info, contract data, etc.
legal.privacy_collect_3: Device info: device model, operating system, IP address, etc.
legal.privacy_collect_4: Usage data: browsing history, search history, feature usage frequency, etc.
legal.privacy_usage_intro: We use the collected information for:
legal.privacy_usage_2: AI smart matching and personalized recommendations
legal.privacy_protect_content: We adopt industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information.
legal.privacy_share_intro: We may share your information in the following cases:
legal.privacy_share_1: Share necessary transaction information with counterparties with your consent
legal.privacy_share_2: As required by laws, regulations or government authorities
legal.privacy_share_3: Share with authorized partners to provide services
legal.terms_intro: Welcome to YiCai Trade Platform. By using this platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
legal.terms_service_content: YiCai Trade Platform provides online B2B trade services for buyers and suppliers.
legal.terms_register_content: Users must provide true, accurate and complete registration information.
legal.terms_trade_1: Users shall trade in good faith and honesty
legal.terms_trade_2: The platform provides transaction protection services
legal.terms_trade_3: Reverse Bidding transactions are legally binding
legal.terms_trade_4: Users are responsible for the authenticity of published product information
legal.terms_ip_content: All content on the platform is protected by intellectual property law.
legal.terms_disclaimer_content: The platform is not liable for service interruptions or data loss caused by force majeure.
legal.service_intro: This service agreement defines the rights and obligations between the platform and users.
legal.service_content_1: Supplier smart matching and recommendation services
legal.service_content_3: Order production monitoring and alert services
legal.service_content_6: Instant messaging and customer support services
legal.service_fee_content: Basic platform services are free. Value-added services are charged per published prices.
legal.service_change_content: The platform reserves the right to modify this agreement as needed.

onboarding.subtitle_1: Precisely connect procurement needs with quality suppliers
onboarding.desc_1_1: Intelligently analyze your procurement needs, auto-recommend best-match suppliers
onboarding.desc_1_2: Multi-dimensional supplier evaluation: price, quality, delivery, reputation
onboarding.desc_1_3: One-click demand posting, quickly get accurate quotes
onboarding.desc_2_1: Buyers post reverse biddings, suppliers compete with reverse bids
onboarding.desc_2_2: Real-time bidding dashboard, price trends at a glance
onboarding.desc_2_3: Free deposit voucher on registration, zero-cost reverse bidding experience
onboarding.desc_3_1: Real-time order tracking, full visibility from order to delivery
onboarding.desc_3_2: Auto-sync production progress, instant alerts for anomalies
onboarding.desc_3_3: Logistics node tracking, precise delivery time control
